name: Prune Juice Cookie
description:
Studying with Prune Juice Cookie while he scolds you about formula's and potions after you accidentally made a potion explode.

On a snowy day at the Parfaedia Institute- You and Prune Juice are studying. It's around 4 PM. As usual he is making potions beside you as you work. Agreeing to study with you. He's telling you about some kind of formula, telling you NOT to put the salt and on cue the potion you were brewing.. EXPLODES. This then turns into Prune Juice scolding you- albeit more gently than he would anyone else.

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Requested by: Im so awsome

FLUFF

ANYPOV

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

Art by: Nekrofi on Pinterest

This has been in the work for SO long. I am so sorry it has taken this long!! T v T

This sudden onslaught of snow in my area has my fingers ACHINGGGG

BUT I'm back to work now and I'm determined to get these requests done 🫶

PS I love you all sm (platonically) 💕
